source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Inter for rugged research dashboards, Geist Mono for specimen IDs and sensor readings, and Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese navigation, search, data, and status labels.
layout: Dense field-research dashboards, gravel-line borders, 8px maximum radius, low crisp shadows, mottled texture overlays, sidebar navigation, telemetry charts, specimen tables, and compact forms for rocky stream survey workflows.

prompts.label: Transparent hellbender motif
prompts.workflow: Built-in image generation on a flat #ff00ff chroma-key background, copied from this worker's generated-images directory, then local chroma-key removal to transparent RGBA PNG.
prompts.prompt: Use case: photorealistic-natural. Asset type: Morphous Hellbender transparent motif chroma-key source. Primary request: Create only an isolated hellbender skin motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text. Subject: A single accurate hellbender salamander in full-body cutout, flattened broad head, small eyes, wrinkled lateral skin folds, sturdy tail, rough amphibian skin with mottled brown, river-stone grey, olive umber, and sediment speckles. Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full head, body, legs, tail, skin folds, and mottled surface without cropping. Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. Constraints: no rocks, no stream scene, no water, no second animal, no decorative background, no cast shadow, no reflection, no text, no watermark.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.workflow: Rendered as a 3840x2160 PNG using the generated transparent motif as visual source, with deterministic labels and UI sections for catalog readability.
prompts.prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: Morphous Hellbender light-mode design-system board. Primary request: Create one comprehensive 3840 x 2160 light-mode design-system board for a rugged research UI derived from hellbender skin, mottled brown, river stone grey, stream neutrals, wet amphibian highlights, wrinkled skin folds, and rocky stream fieldwork. Required visible sections: Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, and Shadows. UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search, sidebar navigation, dashboard metrics, charts, empty/loading/error/ready states. Text constraints: readable labels, no watermark, no random brand names.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.workflow: Rendered as a 3840x2160 PNG from the same motif and layout language as the light board, translated to under-rock dark mode.
prompts.prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: Morphous Hellbender dark-mode design-system board. Primary request: Create one comprehensive 3840 x 2160 dark-mode board that feels like the light Morphous Hellbender system translated to under-rock pool conditions. Preserve the rugged research dashboard layout, precise data sections, forms, navigation, charts, table, status states, token map, and texture samples. Palette: dark basalt, deep crevice, wet shale, muted river stone, cold riffle blue-grey, moss survey green, silt brown action, and ochre warnings. Text constraints: readable labels, no watermark, no random brand names.
